metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the arrive domain.

children.name: Parking Configuration & Policy Management
children.description: Configures parking zones, tariffs, permits, exemptions, dwell rules, and city or operator policies across assets and channels.

children.name: Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization
children.description: Adjusts pricing and occupancy strategy using demand, event, and utilization signals.

children.name: Payment Channel Orchestration
children.description: Coordinates mobile, kiosk, in-car, partner, permit, and other payment channels through one governed payment-control layer.

children.name: Access, Permit & LPR Control
children.description: Manages barrier access, permit validation, LPR flows, and access-event control across parking environments.

children.name: Enforcement & Compliance Workflows
children.description: Coordinates parking enforcement, exemptions, citations, evidence, and dispute or compliance workflows.

children.name: Reservations & Permit Inventory
children.description: Handles reservable inventory, recurring permits, visitor parking, and premium access products.

children.name: Operator Analytics & Control Tower
children.description: Provides a unified operating view across occupancy, yield, compliance, channel mix, and incidents.

children.name: City Mobility Intelligence
children.description: Creates a common city-mobility data layer combining parking, curb, transport, and usage signals.

children.name: Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling
children.description: Models policy, pricing, and curb interventions against forecast and observed mobility outcomes.

children.name: Transit Fare & Open Payment Engine
children.description: Handles open payment, account-based fare logic, capping, and transport-payment orchestration.

children.name: Device & Validator Management
children.description: Operates transport validators, vending and handheld devices, configuration, and maintenance readiness.

children.name: Transit Operations Telemetry
children.description: Combines transaction, device, alert, and service data into one transport operations view.

children.name: Fleet & Business Policy Controls
children.description: Defines employee, driver, visitor, and vehicle parking policies with account and site-level controls.

children.name: Business Billing, Tagging & Expense Controls
children.description: Supports centralized billing, cost-center allocation, session tagging, and expense governance.

children.name: Visitor & Temporary Access Workflows
children.description: Coordinates guest, contractor, and short-term parking workflows with controlled authorization.

children.name: Partner API, Sandbox & Certification
children.description: Provides reusable APIs, test tooling, documentation, and launch workflows for ecosystem integrations.

children.name: Market Catalog & Operator Rules
children.description: Publishes market availability, operator-specific rules, and integration constraints in one controlled catalog.

children.name: Partner Analytics & Revenue Reporting
children.description: Tracks partner transaction quality, attach, revenue mix, and onboarding performance.

children.name: Automotive & In-Car Data Services
children.description: Supports parking, mobility, and payment experiences in connected-car and automotive partner environments.

children.name: Identity & Access Management
children.description: Provides authentication, authorization, tenancy, and role control across operators, partners, businesses, and internal teams.

children.name: Enterprise Integration Layer
children.description: Offers reusable connectors, canonical models, and event-driven integration with municipal, transport, payment, and partner systems.

children.name: API Gateway & Developer Experience
children.description: Provides secure external APIs, throttling, keys, lifecycle governance, and developer-facing controls.

children.name: Eventing & Process Backbone
children.description: Streams business events and coordinates asynchronous workflows across parking, transit, partners, and billing.

children.name: Workflow, Case & Exception Management
children.description: Supports multi-step back-office workflows, SLA tracking, and coordinated exception handling.

children.name: Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation
children.description: Provides the shared transaction ledger, settlement, reconciliation, and financial-control backbone.

children.name: Communications & Notifications
children.description: Handles email, SMS, push, and other triggered or operationally managed communications.

children.name: Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform
children.description: Creates the common reporting layer for KPI packs, planning analytics, and operational monitoring.

children.name: Compliance, Privacy & Audit Controls
children.description: Implements privacy, auditability, financial-control, and regulated operational governance requirements.

children.name: Observability & Reliability Operations
children.description: Provides logging, alerting, incident management, service health, and reliability operations.
